svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 06 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 06: Solution Concept Generation map and seven backward-design questions.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 06 Reference Images
Bottleneck → root cause → solution concept → assumption test
Work backwards from the bottleneck, not from the idea.
2. What is the root cause of the bottleneck?
3. What assumptions does this solution make?
4. What is the cheapest way to test the key assumption?
5. What would make this solution wrong?
6. What does "done" look like in this experiment?
7. What is the next experiment after this one?
• A solution is a bundle of assumptions, not an inspiration
• Concept generation borrows from successful cases but does not copy them
• Test the most dangerous assumption first, not the easiest
• Do not productise too early — let the experiment guide the direction
